theme_and_archetype.theme: Light Theme (with heavy Deep Navy anchor sections)
theme_and_archetype.description: A high-end, authoritative logistics and supply chain aesthetic. Evokes scale, trust, and speed. Uses Deep Navy for structural weight, pure White/Off-White for content clarity, and industrial Action Orange for conversion elements.

scale_rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold

typography.installation_instructions: Add Cabinet Grotesk (from Fontshare or local assets) and IBM Plex Sans (Google Fonts) to the document head and tailwind configuration.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing: p-8, p-12 for internal card paddings. py-24 or py-32 for section vertical padding.

grids.marketing: Mode A 'Tetris' Grid: Asymmetrical spans. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8.
grids.dashboard: Mode B 'Control Room' Grid: Dense. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6.

layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Subtle and sharp: Use rounded-sm (2px) or rounded-none (0px) to maintain the B2B corporate 'Swiss' edge. Avoid fully rounded pill buttons except for floating elements.

buttons.primary: bg-orange-500 text-white font-semibold hover:bg-orange-600 transition-colors duration-200 px-6 py-3 rounded-none shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-navy-900 text-white font-semibold hover:bg-navy-800 transition-colors duration-200 px-6 py-3 rounded-none shadow-sm
buttons.outline: border-2 border-navy-900 text-navy-900 font-semibold hover:bg-navy-900 hover:text-white transition-colors duration-200 px-6 py-3 rounded-none

cards.marketing: bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 p-8 rounded-sm
cards.dashboard: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-none p-6 rounded-sm

header.style: Crystal Glassmorphism on marketing pages: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-gray-200/50.

forms.style: Shadcn UI inputs heavily customized. Sharp corners (rounded-sm), focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500 focus:border-transparent.

logo_placeholder.style: Clean bordered box: w-12 h-12 border-2 border-navy-900 flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-navy-900 tracking-wider bg-white.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) with increased shadow. Buttons transition background color.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Use framer-motion for staggered fade-up entrances on long pages (Services, Expertise).
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for the client logo section. Low speed, smooth drift.

icons_and_assets.library: lucide-react (Standard, sharp icons matching the corporate feel)

home.description: Main landing page focusing on scale and trust.
sections: Hero Slider: Full viewport height (h-screen). Rotating background images (ships, trucks, planes) with a bg-navy-900/50 overlay. Large Cabinet Grotesk H1. Two CTAs: 'Get a Quote' (Primary) and 'Our Solutions' (Outline White).
Trust Bar: Statistics (TEUs shipped, Countries, On-time delivery) on a solid Deep Navy background.
Services Highlight: 4-column bento grid previewing freight, warehousing, customs, last-mile.
Hero: Deep Navy background, no image, massive typography 'Delivering the Future of Freight'.
Team/Corporate image gallery: Structured bento grid of office/meeting photos.
Listings for Freight, Warehousing, Customs, Last Mile. Use alternating left/right layout with large imagery and ample whitespace.
Cards for Automotive, Pharmaceutical, Retail Commerce, Technologies. Dark theme section to differentiate from Services.
Grid of partner logos, testimonials, case study highlights.
Grid of articles. Clean, typography-first cards. 'Read More' links with arrow icons.
Two-column layout: Left side contact details/locations, Right side Get-in-Touch form. Floating WhatsApp button fixed to bottom right of viewport across the site.

admin_dashboard.description: CMS and analytics interface for staff.
sections: Layout: Left sidebar (Dark Navy), Top header (White), Content area (Gray-50).
Dashboard Overview: KPIs (Leads, Active Quotes, Blog Views).
Blog CMS: Table of posts, 'Create New' button, WYSIWYG editor placeholder.
Lead Management: Data table of captured quotes and contact submissions.

hero_slider.description: Cargo ship at sea, highly cinematic, perfect for first slide.
White semi-truck on highway, fast moving.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a hybrid_fullstack app. Both the marketing site and admin dashboard live in the same app. Separate routes (e.g., /admin for dashboard).
Use standard HTML+Tailwind for complex marketing layouts. Use Shadcn components for forms, tables, and the entire Admin Dashboard.
Implement a logo placeholder using a div containing the text 'CFF' with a thick navy border.
Integrate a hero slider on the Home page using Framer Motion or a standard carousel library. Add a dark overlay so text is highly readable.
Use data-testid on ALL interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='quote-submit-btn').
Implement a floating WhatsApp button at the bottom right with position: fixed.
Ensure 'Cabinet Grotesk' is applied to H1-H4, and 'IBM Plex Sans' to body text. If you cannot load them, fallback to standard sans-serif but define the font-family explicitly in tailwind config.
For the clients logo marquee, use standard images and remove background via CSS mix-blend-mode: multiply if needed, or grayscale them via CSS filter: grayscale(100%).
